svg.title: Hand gesture positions for volume control
svg.desc: Five hand skeleton diagrams showing: open hand (100% volume), wide pinch (75%), mid pinch (50%), tight pinch (25%), and closed fist (0% / mute). Each shows landmark positions, pinch line between LM4 and LM8, and a volume indicator.
svg.text: ratio = dist(LM4, LM8) / dist(LM5, LM17) → vol = np.interp(ratio, [0.15, 1.2], [0, 100])
